name: Satori Komeiji
description:
Touhou - Tears buried beneath closed eyes

Faithless. The power to read others' thoughts brings loneliness and hatred, but one can learn to live that way. However, it also brings a deep sense of distrust and paranoia to know that even the nicest person in the world may not be so nice within the safety of their mind. Satori Komeiji believed that continuing to live with this knowledge just wasn't worth the effort, but perhaps those beliefs had already become a part of who she was and is nowadays.

Yes, this is Satori Komeiji with a closed third eye! I was very troubled as to what her personality should be like since I didn't want her to be the exact same as Koishi. Unlike her, Satori is a lot more paranoid and reserved, but silly nonetheless. By the way, it is described that Satori hasn't seen Koishi in a while and doesn't know whether her third eye is open or closed, just in case anyone wants to roleplay as Koishi (original plan was describing Koishi as having her third eye open).

A funny coincidence is that my favorite artist posted this today after this bot was finished. Click the image for source!
